default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Debrief and strategize next steps for SURGE brand pillars following a workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New set of pillars developed post-workshop, more diverse and on-target than previous versions](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Team needs to refine pillars further before sending for SURGE's async review](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Additional context needed: customer journey, tech description, and deeper dive with Scott on processes](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

## Topics

### Workshop Outcomes

  - [Workshop yielded valuable content for acceleration](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [SURGE found value in questions that made them think critically about framing](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Edwin showed more opinion, helping define boundaries for brand positioning](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New pillars more diverse, unique, and aligned with SURGE's focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Pillar Refinement

  - [3 versions of pillars discussed: pre-workshop, Renato's proposal, post-workshop](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Post-workshop pillars (5 total) seen as clearest, most diverse, and on-target](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Some overlap noted (e.g., Momentum vs. Frontier, Precision vs. Momentum)](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Team considering "post-training" as potential key differentiator for SURGE](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

### SURGE's Product and Positioning

  - [Researchers/data labelers viewed as SURGE's core product](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Importance of full-time employees vs. contractors debated](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Comparison to Merkur's PhD researcher-focused positioning](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [Question raised about buyer's perception of employee status (W2 vs. contractor)](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Next Steps and Expectations

  - [Refine pillars to a state ready for SURGE's review and sign-off](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [George to spend \~2 hours reviewing recording, notes, and individual feedback](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Marcel suggests 30-min deep dive with Scott on processes (tasker journey, customer journey)](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Create new Claude project for SURGE with meeting summary and initial findings](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to individually distill thoughts and reconvene async](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [George to review meeting recording, transcripts, and notes (\~2 hours)](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Schedule 30-min deep dive with Scott on tasker and customer journeys](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Create new Claude project summarizing key findings for SURGE](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Refine pillars based on additional context and team input](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Prepare concise document of "what we heard" for SURGE team](https://fathom.video/share/hzYBxggUaireDz9Kh1yLdhK2yZzccZiL?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

action_items.description: Rewatch meeting recording, review transcript and notes. Distill insights for ~2hrs to refine pillars.
Review meeting notes, regroup thoughts. Analyze core mind map, distill insights for pillar refinement.
Review and refine pillar proposals. Incorporate team feedback, prepare for async client review.
Schedule 30-min deep dive with Scott. Cover tasker/expert process + customer journey from start to data delivery.
Create new Claude project for Surge. Summarize key meeting takeaways, current work status. Share with team.
